response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the 'Guitar, Loneliness and Blue Planet' and 'Hello/How are you' reference lyrics. 2. The provided JSON only contained small fragments of the lyrics; I have transcribed the full vocal performance for both songs. 3. Subtitles are paused during the instrumental interlude (00:54-01:43). 4. Timing is strictly tied to vocal audio bursts with semantic splitting for readability.

subtitles.original: ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星
subtitles.english: Guitar, Loneliness and Blue Planet

subtitles.original: 聞いて、聴けよ
subtitles.english: Listen, hear me out

subtitles.original: 私 私 私はここにいる
subtitles.english: I, I, I am here

subtitles.original: 殴り書きみたいな音
subtitles.english: With sounds like scribbles,

subtitles.original: 出せない状態で叫んだよ
subtitles.english: I screamed while I couldn't let them out

subtitles.original: なんかになりたい なりたい
subtitles.english: I want to become something, I want to be...

subtitles.original: 何者かであっても
subtitles.english: ...someone, whoever it may be

subtitles.original: 馬鹿な私は歌うだけ
subtitles.english: Foolish me, I just sing

subtitles.original: ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
subtitles.english: Shall I spill it all out to the stars?

subtitles.original: ハロ／ハワユ
subtitles.english: Hello/How are you

subtitles.original: ハロ
subtitles.english: Hello

subtitles.original: 窓を開けて 小さく呟いた
subtitles.english: I open my window and whisper quietly

subtitles.original: ハワユ
subtitles.english: How are you?

subtitles.original: 誰もいない 部屋で一人
subtitles.english: In a room all by myself

subtitles.original: モーニン
subtitles.english: Morning

subtitles.original: 朝が来たよ
subtitles.english: Morning has come,

subtitles.original: 土砂降りの朝が
subtitles.english: a morning of downpouring rain

subtitles.original: チックタック
subtitles.english: Tick-tock

subtitles.original: 私のネジを
subtitles.english: Someone, please...

subtitles.original: 誰か巻いて
subtitles.english: ...wind up my spring

subtitles.original: ハロ
subtitles.english: Hello

subtitles.original: 昔のアニメに そんなのいたっけな
subtitles.english: Was there someone like that in an old anime?

subtitles.original: ハワユ
subtitles.english: How are you?

subtitles.original: 羨ましいな みんなに愛されて
subtitles.english: I'm so jealous, being loved by everyone

subtitles.original: スリーピン
subtitles.english: Sleeping

subtitles.original: 馬鹿なこと言ってないで 支度をしなくちゃ
subtitles.english: Stop saying silly things and get ready

subtitles.original: クライン
subtitles.english: Crying

subtitles.original: 涙の跡を隠すため
subtitles.english: To hide the traces of my tears

subtitles.original: もう 口癖になった『まぁいっか』
subtitles.english: 'Oh well' has become my catchphrase

subtitles.original: 昨日の言葉がふと頭をよぎる
subtitles.english: Yesterday's words suddenly cross my mind

subtitles.original: 『もう君には全然期待してないから』
subtitles.english: 'I'm not expecting anything from you anymore'

subtitles.original: そりゃまぁ私だって 自分に期待などしてないけれど
subtitles.english: Well, even I don't expect anything from myself

subtitles.original: アレは一体どういうつもりですか
subtitles.english: But what on earth did you mean by that?

subtitles.original: 喉元まで出かかった言葉
subtitles.english: The words that were on the tip of my tongue

subtitles.original: 口を突いて出たのは嘘
subtitles.english: What came out of my mouth was a lie

subtitles.original: こうして今日も私は貴重な
subtitles.english: And so today as well, I continue to live...

subtitles.original: 言葉を浪費して生きていく
subtitles.english: ...wasting these precious words

subtitles.original: 何故隠してしまうのですか
subtitles.english: Why do you hide it away?

subtitles.original: 笑われるのが怖いのですか
subtitles.english: Are you afraid of being laughed at?

subtitles.original: 誰にも会いたくないのですか
subtitles.english: Do you not want to see anyone?

subtitles.original: それ本当ですか
subtitles.english: Is that really true?

subtitles.original: 曖昧という名の海に溺れて
subtitles.english: Drowning in a sea called 'ambiguity'

subtitles.original: 息も出来ないほど苦しいの
subtitles.english: It's so painful I can't even breathe

subtitles.original: 少し声が聞きたくなりました
subtitles.english: I've started to want to hear your voice a little

subtitles.original: 本当に弱いな
subtitles.english: I'm really so weak

subtitles.original: 一向に進まない支度の途中
subtitles.english: In the middle of getting ready, making no progress

subtitles.original: 朦朧とした頭で思う
subtitles.english: I think with a hazy head

subtitles.original: もう理由をつけて休んでしまおうかな
subtitles.english: Maybe I should just make an excuse and take the day off

subtitles.original: いやいや分かってますって
subtitles.english: No, no, I know...

subtitles.original: なんとなく言ってみただけだよ
subtitles.english: I just said it for no particular reason

subtitles.original: 分かってるから怒らないでよ
subtitles.english: I know, so don't be mad

subtitles.original: 幸せだろうと 不幸せだろうと
subtitles.english: Whether I'm happy or unhappy

subtitles.original: 平等に残酷に朝日は昇る
subtitles.english: The morning sun rises equally and cruelly

subtitles.original: 生きてるだけで精一杯の私に
subtitles.english: For me, who's doing my best just to stay alive

subtitles.original: これ以上何を望むというの
subtitles.english: What more do you want from me?

subtitles.original: 何故気にしてしまうのですか
subtitles.english: Why do you care so much?
